gpu: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2070 with Max-Q Design
notes: Worked perfectly with no tweaks needed. Played through entire game (it's short).
title: SEPTEMBER 1999

notes:
Would error on startup with "Failed to initialize player

Failed to initialize graphics.
Make sure you have DirectX 11 installed, have up to date
drivers for your graphics card and have not disabled
3D acceleration in display settings.
InitializeEngineGraphics failed"

Easily fixed by changing launch command to  "PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%"
title: SEPTEMBER 1999
